channel.title: physics.gen-ph updates on arXiv.org
channel.description: physics.gen-ph updates on the arXiv.org e-print archive.

item.title: The extended phase space approach to quantization of gravity and its perspective
item.description: arXiv:2603.19243v1 Announce Type: new Abstract: The prerequisites of the extended phase space approach to quantization of gravity, which is alternative to the Wheeler-DeWitt one and other existing approaches, are presented. The features of the proposed approach and conclusions from its underlying ideas are discussed.
item.arxiv:journal_reference: Bled Workshops in Physics, 26 (2025), No. 1, P. 323-332
item.dc:creator: T. P. Shestakova
